name: Mexico
style_of_play: Compact mid-block with quick transitions and technical combinations in the final third.
strengths: experience in CONCACAF and World Cups
weaknesses: can struggle when forced to chase games
physicality mismatch in midfield at times
tactical_summary: Defend in a narrow 4-4-2 mid-block and break through quick vertical passes to wingers; fullbacks join selectively to avoid leaving gaps on the counter.
why_it_matters: Mexico's familiarity with host-nation pressure and passionate support can elevate performance in key group and knockout fixtures.
injury_news: Placeholder — squad news pending live data integration.
